Contact

Intermediate 
Technical Support 
Intermediate 

Languages 
English 
Spanish 

Benjamin Medrano 

MOTIVATED HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATE | BILINGUAL 
CUSTOMER SERVICE & IT SUPPORT 

Professional Summary 

Reliable and engaging high school graduate with proven customer service 
excellence, bilingual communication abilities, and strong organizational 
skills. Demonstrated ability to work effectively in team environments, 
manage multiple tasks, and maintain professional standards. Eager to 
apply communication and service. 

Professional Experience 

Intern – Duro Internship    2022-03 – 2022-09 
R.A.I.N INC CENTER | Bronx, NY 
Provided technical support and organizational assistance in a professional 
internship setting. 

•  Troubleshot hardware and software issues, improving user 

experience. 

•  Assisted clients with technical problems, delivering clear and 

effective guidance. 

•  Organized office inventory, enhancing workspace efficiency and 

accessibility. 

Student Intern    2023-05 – 2023-09 
Crotona International High School | Bronx, NY 
Supported school activities and provided translation services to facilitate 
communication. 

•  Assisted with Spanish–English translations for students and teachers. 
•  Led group projects, coordinating responsibilities among peers. 
•  Collaborated effectively with classmates, demonstrating teamwork 

excellence. 

Intern – Montefiore Einstein Comprehensive Cancer Center    
2023-11 – 2024-05 
Montefiore Einstein Cancer Center | Bronx, NY 
Supported administrative and organizational tasks within a healthcare 
research environment. 

•  Organized office supplies and inventory, streamlining operations. 
•  Assisted staff with technical troubleshooting and administrative 

tasks. 

•  Contributed to a productive work environment through efficient 

organization. 

Education 

High School Diploma in Leadership, Bilingual Communication, and 
Technical Skills 
Crotona International High School 
2021 - 2025-06
